about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: I toured with it in Europe about a year ago. It was John Gordon — he didn’t tour but the recording would be John Gordon, Vince Herring and Jesse Davis and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods interviewed by Monk Rowe, Delaware Water Gap, PA, November 8, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster and Bill Hughes
about_quotes.evidence: Jesse Davis, another alto saxophonist... These are the youngsters that are, that are carrying on authentic jazz.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster and Bill Hughes interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, Schenectady, New York, March 28, 1995
